scripts.postinstall:
node -e "process.stderr.write('
⚠️  DEPRECATED: @cortexui/ai-contract is no longer maintained.
CortexUI has been renamed to DOMglyph. Please migrate:
  npm uninstall @cortexui/ai-contract
  npm install @domglyph/ai-contract
See: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@domglyph/ai-contract

')"
